title: EjThePvP'S PvP Pack
description:
Improve Your PvP with This Pack It Add Pvp Essentials Like Small Swords, Totem Pop Counter and More Just remember to equip 
all the resource packs!
body:
This Mod Pack Adds Everything You Need!
It Ads Totem Pop Counter Small Swords And More
Make Sure To Equipt The recorce packs!
this pack is very good for competive pvp / bedwars
It May Be A Little Lagy, If So Just Turn Down The Graphic Settings!
